name: Croissant Dataset Metadata Format
description: Standardized format for describing ML datasets — schema for metadata covering data attributes, provenance, format, and intended use. Supports reproducibility and dataset governance.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used for cloud-hosted dataset publishing and discovery.
